description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard parcel box with an open top, revealing a coiled, light-colored item inside, possibly yarn or string. The box is made from corrugated cardboard, with visible flaps folded outward and a die-cut window on one side that allows partial visibility of the contents. The exterior is plain and unmarked, with a neutral beige color and visible corrugation along the edges. The window is covered with a transparent plastic film, providing a clear view of the coiled contents within. The box is lightweight and designed for easy handling, suitable for shipping or storage of soft, lightweight goods. The overall construction is typical of retail or delivery packaging, with a focus on protection and visibility of the product inside.
description: A beige cardboard parcel box with an open top and a transparent window showing a coiled, light-colored item inside. The box features outward-folded flaps and a clear plastic film over the window.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open flaps and the coiled contents visible through the transparent window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the box and the open top flap extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open top and a clear look at the coiled item inside, no window visible.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1 but from the opposite direction, showing the open flap and box depth.
